title: Lateral Entry/Migration Admission
content: Lateral Entry/Migration Admission Galgotias University is accepting the student’s applications under the Lateral Entry/Migration scheme for various programmes for the current academic year. Students who fulfill the eligibility conditions shall be given opportunities at Galgotias University for professional growth and career improvement. University is offering Lateral Entry for the following programmes: - B.Tech (All Streams) - Diploma ( (Polytechnic)) - Bachelor of Design in Interior and Spatial Design - Bachelor of Hotel Management - Bachelor of Pharmacy - Bachelor of Science in Hotel Management - Bachelor of Technology in Biomedical Engineering - Bachelor of Technology in Biotechnology - Bachelor of Technology in Chemical and Biochemical Engineering - Bachelor of Technology in Defence Technology (Aerospace Technology) - Bachelor of Technology in Defence Technology (Artificial Intelligence & Cyber Security) - Bachelor of Technology in Defence Technology (Communication Systems & Sensors) - Bachelor of Technology in Food Technology Migration through Credit transfer scheme in the following programmes: - B.Tech (All Programs) - BBA AI (All Specialization) - BCA (All Specialization ) - B.Sc (Hons ) Computer Science (All Specialization) - B.Sc (Hons) Forensic Science (All Specialization) - B.Sc AI (All Specialization) - B.A. (Hons) in Economics - B.A. (Hons) in English - B.A. (Hons) in French - B.A. (Hons) in Japanese - B.A. (Hons) in Political Science - B.A. (Hons) in Psychology - B.A. (Hons) in Sociology - B.A. in Film Production and Theatre - B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - BBA - BBA (Aviation Management) - BBA (Digital Marketing) - BBA (Logistics & Supply Chain Management) - BBA (Tourism and Travel) - BBA in Banking Financial Services and Insurance - BBA in Business Analytics - BBA in Financial, investment and Analysis - BBA in Marketing & Automobile Management - B.Com (Hons) - B.Com (Hons) in Applied Finance and Analytics - B.Com (Hons) in Financial Market - B.Com (Hons) in International Accounting and Finance - B.Des in Advertising, Graphic & Web Design - B.Des in Communication Design - B.Des in Fashion Design - B.Des in Interior and Spatial Design - B.Des in Product Design - Bachelor of Hotel Management - Bachelor of Pharmacy - B.Sc (Hons with Research) in Economics - B.Sc (Hons) Biotechnology - B.Sc (Hons) in Physics - B.Sc (Hons) in Zoology - B.Sc in (General) PCM - B.Sc in Food Science And Dietetics - B.Sc in Healthcare and Clinical Research - B.Sc in Hotel Management - B.Sc in Medical Biotechnology -
